title: Audit the current /vote implementation for remaining failure modes after the recent timeout/quorum fixes. Focus on source repo /Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config and active runtime /Users/masayuki/.claude. Look for fail-open paths, parser bugs, missing tests, and provider-availability gaps...
summary_text: 1. **Fail-open on missing consensus engine (runtime + source)** [`/Users/masayuki/.claude/hooks/auto-vote.sh:183`]( /Users/masayuki/.claude/hooks/auto-vote.sh:183 ) and [`/Users/masayuki/.claude/hooks/auto-vote.sh:185`]( /Users/masayuki/.claude/hooks/auto-vote.sh:185 ) (same in source: [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/hooks/auto-vote.sh:183`]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/hooks/auto-vote.sh:183 )) explicitly allow execution (`exit 0`) when `consensus-vote.js` is missing. 2. **Runtime parser regression: security votes can be forced to `REJECT` by score scaling + veto** Parser uses `score/max` with default `max=10` at [`/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js:326`]( /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js:326 ) and [`/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js:328`]( /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js:328 ); security prompt emits `score: 0-3` at [`/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js:298`]( /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js:298 ), so even `3` maps to `0.3 => REJECT`. That feeds hard veto at [`/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js:410`]( /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js:410 ) and [`/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js:415`]( /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js:415 ). 3. **Runtime parser/provider contract mismatch: GLM conditional approvals degrade to `ABSTAIN`** GLM general reviewer is prompted to return `verdict: APPROVE|CONDITIONAL_APPROVE|REJECT` at [`/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate-glm.js:206`]( /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate-glm.js:206 ). Parser only recognizes `vote`, `risk_assessment`, or exact `"conditional"` token at [`/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js:309`]( /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js:309 ) and [`/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js:370`]( /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js:370 ), so `CONDITIONAL_APPROVE` is not mapped and falls through to `ABSTAIN` at [`/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js:379`]( /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js:379 ). 4. **Provider preflight realism gap (runtime + source): availability checks are shallower than runtime requirements** Preflight gates voters via [`/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js:596`]( /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js:596 ) using checks limited to credentials/binary/DNS in [`/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/provider-preflight.js:69`]( /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/provider-preflight.js:69 )–[`84`]( /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/provider-preflight.js:84 ). Actual delegates also require SDK modules (`openai` at [`/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate-glm.js:424`]( /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate-glm.js:424 ), `@google/generative-ai` at [`/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate-gemini.js:174`]( /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate-gemini.js:174 )) and codex runtime/auth execution (`spawn codex` at [`/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js:513`]( /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js:513 )). These are not preflighted. 5. **Source repo drift leaves weaker `/vote` behavior than active runtime**...
